About

I'm a marketing generalist who thrives at the intersection of content, strategy, and execution. At careviso, a B2B healthtech startup, I built and own the full marketing mix — from SEO and social to podcast production, email automation, and sales enablement.

My work is defined by measurable outcomes: a 150%+ lift in organic traffic, scalable email workflows for Inside Sales, and a content engine that keeps a lean team punching above its weight.

Outside of work, I founded Playbook Press — a fantasy football TikTok brand that hit 4.7M+ views in a single NFL season with zero paid spend. It's my proof of concept for what great content strategy looks like in the wild.

I'm targeting my next role in Tech/SaaS, Media, Fintech, or Sports — ideally a Manager or Specialist-level position in Content, Digital, or Brand Marketing.

Selected Work

Case Study — SEO
150%+ Organic Traffic Growth at careviso
Led end-to-end SEO strategy in partnership with Web Development at a B2B healthtech startup. Overhauled on-page optimization, built a keyword framework around prior authorization and revenue cycle management, and established a content calendar that compounded rankings over 12+ months. Measured weekly using Google Search Console, SEMrush, and Google Analytics.
150%+ Organic Traffic Lift Google Search Console · SEMrush · GA4 careviso · 2024–Present
Writing — PR
Press Releases & Thought Leadership
Authored press releases and executive bylines supporting product launches, partnership announcements, and brand awareness campaigns in the healthtech space. Written to serve dual audiences: trade press and C-suite buyers.
Coordination of Benefits ↗ Connectathon ↗ PA On File Launch ↗
B2B Healthtech careviso
Writing — Content
Blog Articles & White Papers
Produced long-form content covering prior authorization automation, ePA workflows, and revenue cycle management. Each piece was SEO-informed, sales-aligned, and designed to move prospects through the funnel.

Social Media — B2B
Social Strategy & Creative at careviso
Developed and executed careviso's social media strategy across LinkedIn and other platforms. Designed assets in Adobe Illustrator and InDesign, tracked engagement metrics, and iterated content based on performance data.
LinkedIn Adobe Illustrator · InDesign

Podcast Production & Distribution
Managed end-to-end podcast production for careviso — video and audio editing, promotional asset creation, and distribution across major platforms. Built a repeatable production workflow that scaled across multiple episodes.

Writing — Editorial

Playbook Press

85%+
Organic FYP Reach

Playbook Press is an independent fantasy football content brand I founded and built entirely from scratch — strategy, design, copywriting, editing, and analytics. In a single NFL season, the TikTok account generated 4.7M+ views, 194K+ likes, and 3,700+ followers with zero paid promotion. The 85%+ For You Page reach rate reflects a disciplined approach to short-form content optimization: the right hooks, the right cadence, and a clear editorial voice. It's the most direct proof of what I can do when given full creative ownership.
